Jan 18, 2018  19:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Wall is the Wall</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_953948941674078208" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/953948941674078208" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 18, 2018  19:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....The Wall will be paid for</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_953951365532876800" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/953951365532876800" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 18, 2018  20:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Will be going to Pennsylvania today in order to give my total support to RICK SACCONE</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_953973568035086336" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/953973568035086336" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 18, 2018  21:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We need the Wall for the safety and security of our country. We need the Wall to help stop the massive inflow of drugs from Mexico</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_953979393180950528" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/953979393180950528" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 18, 2018  21:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;CHIP should be part of a long term solution</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_953984671674662912" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/953984671674662912" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 18, 2018  21:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;A government shutdown will be devastating to our military...something the Dems care very little about!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_953987636057821184" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/953987636057821184" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2018  04:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Departing Pittsburgh now</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954092417250222082" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954092417250222082" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2018  05:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;AMERICA will once again be a NATION that thinks big</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954097213608570880" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954097213608570880" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2018  07:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;House of Representatives needs to pass Government Funding Bill tonight. So important for our country - our Military needs it!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954136290768846850" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954136290768846850" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2018  20:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Government Funding Bill past last night in the House of Representatives. Now Democrats are needed if it is to pass in the Senate - but they want illegal immigration and weak borders. Shutdown coming? We need more Republican victories in 2018!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954323750949982208" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954323750949982208" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2018  00:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;.@WhiteHouse Briefing with Director Marc Short and Director Mick Mulvaney... https://t.co/0O0VsYXmHB&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954386490842378241" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954386490842378241" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2018  00:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“Shutting down the government is a very serious thing. People die</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954390114968498176" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954390114968498176" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2018  02:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Today</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954423170299199488" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954423170299199488" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2018  04:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just signed 702 Bill to reauthorize foreign intelligence collection. This is NOT the same FISA law that was so wrongly abused during the election. I will always do the right thing for our country and put the safety of the American people first!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954456754137501697" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954456754137501697" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2018  06:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Excellent preliminary meeting in Oval with @SenSchumer - working on solutions for Security and our great Military together with @SenateMajLdr McConnell and @SpeakerRyan. Making progress - four week extension would be best!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954478044487520257" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954478044487520257" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2018  10:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Not looking good for our great Military or Safety &amp;amp; Security on the very dangerous Southern Border. Dems want a Shutdown in order to help diminish the great success of the Tax Cuts</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954541219970977793" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954541219970977793" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2018  19:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Democrats are far more concerned with Illegal Immigrants than they are with our great Military or Safety at our dangerous Southern Border. They could have easily made a deal but decided to play Shutdown politics instead. #WeNeedMoreRepublicansIn18 in order to power through mess!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954674157144477696" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954674157144477696" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2018  19:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This is the One Year Anniversary of my Presidency and the Democrats wanted to give me a nice present. #DemocratShutdown&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954678287820902401" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954678287820902401" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2018  19:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;For those asking</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954680914998648833" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954680914998648833" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2018  19:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;#AMERICA FIRST!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954681839419101185" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954681839419101185" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2018  22:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Democrats are holding our Military hostage over their desire to have unchecked illegal immigration. Can’t let that happen!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954722155463430145" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954722155463430145" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2018  02:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Beautiful weather all over our great country</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954788467069870081" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954788467069870081" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2018  06:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Unprecedented success for our Country</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954843844402647040" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954843844402647040" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2018  08:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @realDonaldTrump: Democrats are far more concerned with Illegal Immigrants than they are with our great Military or Safety at our dangerous Southern Border. They could have easily made a deal but decided to play Shutdown politics instead. #WeNeedMoreRepublicansIn18 in order to power through mess!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954876269300248576" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954876269300248576" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2018  08:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Trump Administration has terminated more UNNECESSARY Regulation</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954878124214415360" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954878124214415360" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2018  10:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Eric Trump on @JudgeJeanine on @FoxNews now!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954901073587834882" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954901073587834882" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2018  10:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @FoxNews: .@EricTrump: &#x27;People have seen a year that&#x27;s incredible</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954904160016785413" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954904160016785413" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2018  10:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @FoxNews: .@davidwebbshow: &#x27;Let&#x27;s look at the calendar. It&#x27;s January 20th. DACA expires on March 5th. That means this was a construct of @TheDemocrats.&#x27; #shutdown https://t.co/g2lsN9CM6K&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954904246494916609" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954904246494916609" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2018  10:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @FoxNews: .@KellyannePolls: &#x27;Since @POTUS took office</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954904669112995840" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954904669112995840" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2018  10:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @FoxNews: .@EricTrump: &#x27;My father was elected for one reason</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_954905101717655552" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/954905101717655552" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2018  20:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @realDonaldTrump: Democrats are holding our Military hostage over their desire to have unchecked illegal immigration. Can’t let that happen!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_955052436187701248" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/955052436187701248" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2018  20:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great to see how hard Republicans are fighting for our Military and Safety at the Border. The Dems just want illegal immigrants to pour into our nation unchecked. If stalemate continues</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_955056249925750784" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/955056249925750784" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2018  09:21</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to Brad Blakeman on @FoxNews for grading year one of my presidency with an “A”-and likewise to Doug Schoen for the very good grade and statements. Working hard!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_955249077645643776" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/955249077645643776" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2018  21:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democrats are turning down services and security for citizens in favor of services and security for non-citizens. Not good!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_955426609326100480" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/955426609326100480" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2018  21:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Democrats have shut down our government in the interests of their far left base. They don’t want to do it but are powerless!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_955428815777533952" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/955428815777533952" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2018  23:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;End the Democrats Obstruction! https://t.co/tzBXilvW1b&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_955458357200130049" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/955458357200130049" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 23, 2018  12:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Big win for Republicans as Democrats cave on Shutdown. Now I want a big win for everyone</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_955658992793149440" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/955658992793149440" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 23, 2018  19:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Even Crazy Jim Acosta of Fake News CNN agrees: “Trump World and WH sources dancing in end zone: Trump wins again...Schumer and Dems caved...gambled and lost.” Thank you for your honesty Jim!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_955764970590961665" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/955764970590961665" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 23, 2018  19:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;In one of the biggest stories in a long time</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; There has never been anything like it. Now Disney</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956134228726558720" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956134228726558720" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 25, 2018  04:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Earlier today</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956261892640604161" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956261892640604161" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 25, 2018  06:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;It was my great honor to welcome Mayor’s from across America to the WH. My Administration will always support local government - and listen to the leaders who know their communities best. Together</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956298399946563585" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956298399946563585" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 25, 2018  08:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Will soon be heading to Davos</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956322473955545089" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956322473955545089" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2018  01:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great bilateral meeting with Prime Minister Theresa May of the United Kingdom</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956578887160532992" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956578887160532992" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956588348864454656" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956588348864454656" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2018  06:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Today</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956657520562573312" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956657520562573312" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2018  18:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Will be interviewed on  @SquawkCNBC by @JoeSquawk coming up at 6:00amE from Davos</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956831942351183873" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956831942351183873" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2018  18:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;It was an honor to meet with Republic of Rwanda President Paul Kagame this morning in Davos</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956840839627595776" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956840839627595776" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2018  19:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great bilateral meeting with President @Alain_Berset of the Swiss Confederation - as we continue to strengthen our great friendship. Such an honor to be in Switzerland! #WEF18 https://t.co/87pLrCpQkZ&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956849981528379392" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956849981528379392" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2018  20:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Join me live at the 2018 World Economic Forum in Davos</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956873004776116225" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956873004776116225" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2018  01:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Heading back from a very exciting two days in Davos</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956937916374138880" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956937916374138880" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2018  01:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;DACA has been made increasingly difficult by the fact that Cryin’ Chuck Schumer took such a beating over the shutdown that he is unable to act on immigration!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_956938973326098432" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/956938973326098432" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2018  07:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you for the wonderful welcome @WEF! #Davos2018 https://t.co/IQkoQJxR5B&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_957032249509097472" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/957032249509097472" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2018  19:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to Brandon Judd of the National Border Patrol Council for his strong statement on @foxandfriends that we very badly NEED THE WALL. Must also end loophole of “catch &amp;amp; release” and clean up the legal and other procedures at the border NOW for Safety &amp;amp; Security reasons.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_957220637705109505" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/957220637705109505" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 28, 2018  03:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;On Holocaust Remembrance Day we mourn and grieve the murder of 6 million innocent Jewish men</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_957334999522533376" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/957334999522533376" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 28, 2018  06:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Taliban targeted innocent Afghans</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Jan 28, 2018  11:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I have offered DACA a wonderful deal</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_957462746060206080" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/957462746060206080" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 28, 2018  12:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Democrats are not interested in Border Safety &amp;amp; Security or in the funding and rebuilding of our Military. They are only interested in Obstruction!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_957465263129219073" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/957465263129219073" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 28, 2018  21:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Somebody please inform Jay-Z that because of my policies</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_957603800579297280" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/957603800579297280" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 28, 2018  21:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Our economy is better than it has been in many decades. Businesses are coming back to America like never before. Chrysler</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_957603804383465472" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/957603804383465472" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 30, 2018  04:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to America’s new Secretary of @HHSGov</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_958070403901124609" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/958070403901124609" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 31, 2018  10:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Join me live for the #SOTU https://t.co/0SLktWxfHi&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_958520216429957121" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/958520216429957121" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 01, 2018  19:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Heading to beautiful West Virginia to be with great members of the Republican Party. Will be planning Infrastructure and discussing Immigration and DACA</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959029384052166657" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959029384052166657" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 01, 2018  19:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;March 5th is rapidly approaching and the Democrats are doing nothing about DACA. They Resist</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959031505145212928" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959031505145212928" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 01, 2018  20:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you for all of the nice compliments and reviews on the State of the Union speech. 45.6 million people watched</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959034299222843394" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959034299222843394" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 02, 2018  11:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democrats just aren’t calling about DACA. Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer have to get moving fast</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959268334935203840" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959268334935203840" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 02, 2018  19:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The top Leadership and Investigators of the FBI and the Justice Department have politicized the sacred investigative process in favor of Democrats and against Republicans - something which would have been unthinkable just a short time ago. Rank &amp;amp; File are great people!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959389424806191104" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959389424806191104" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 02, 2018  19:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“You had Hillary Clinton and the Democratic Party try to hide the fact that they gave money to GPS Fusion to create a Dossier which was used by their allies in the Obama Administration to convince a Court misleadingly</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959393270144086016" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959393270144086016" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959488037766955009" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959488037766955009" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2018  21:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @EricTrump: #MakeAmericaGreatAgain 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸 https://t.co/CJts3udtNO&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959784619712401410" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959784619712401410" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2018  22:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Rasmussen just announced that my approval rating jumped to 49%</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959798726381457409" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959798726381457409" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2018  22:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This memo totally vindicates “Trump” in probe. But the Russian Witch Hunt goes on and on. Their was no Collusion and there was no Obstruction (the word now used because</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959798743842349056" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959798743842349056" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 04, 2018  08:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great jobs numbers and finally</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959946200488271872" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959946200488271872" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 04, 2018  08:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“The four page memo released Friday reports the disturbing fact about how the FBI and FISA appear to have been used to influence the 2016 election and its aftermath....The FBI failed to inform the FISA court that the Clinton campaign had funded the dossier....the FBI became....&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959949725028974592" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959949725028974592" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 04, 2018  08:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...a tool of anti-Trump political actors. This is unacceptable in a democracy and ought to alarm anyone who wants the FBI to be a nonpartisan enforcer of the law....The FBI wasn’t straight with Congress</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_959952974826098688" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/959952974826098688" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2018  00:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My thoughts and prayers are with all of the victims involved in this mornings train collision in South Carolina. Thank you to our incredible First Responders for the work they’ve done!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_960195808141414400" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/960195808141414400" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2018  11:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to the Philadelphia Eagles on a great Super Bowl victory!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_960361010904338432" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/960361010904338432" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2018  20:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democrats are pushing for Universal HealthCare while thousands of people are marching in the UK because their U system is going broke and not working. Dems want to greatly raise taxes for really bad and non-personal medical care. No thanks!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_960486144818450432" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/960486144818450432" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2018  20:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to @foxandfriends for exposing the truth. Perhaps that’s why your ratings are soooo much better than your untruthful competition!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_960487657691385856" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/960487657691385856" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2018  20:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Little Adam Schiff</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_960492998734868480" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/960492998734868480" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2018  22:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Any deal on DACA that does not include STRONG border security and the desperately needed WALL is a total waste of time. March 5th is rapidly approaching and the Dems seem not to care about DACA. Make a deal!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_960522569492426753" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/960522569492426753" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 06, 2018  21:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;So disgraceful that a person illegally in our country killed @Colts linebacker Edwin Jackson. This is just one of many such preventable tragedies. We must get the Dems to get tough on the Border</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Feb 07, 2018  00:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We need a 21st century MERIT-BASED immigration system.  Chain migration and the visa lottery are outdated programs that hurt our economic and national security. https://t.co/rP9Gtr2E5N&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp;
