This achievement</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961073467784421382" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961073467784421382" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 07, 2018  22:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;In the “old days</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961253168968622086" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961253168968622086" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 08, 2018  00:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;NEW FBI TEXTS ARE BOMBSHELLS!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961270833569202176" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961270833569202176" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 08, 2018  02:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Best wishes to the Republic of Korea on hosting the @Olympics! What a wonderful opportunity to show everyone that you are a truly GREAT NATION! https://t.co/aboM2Up48y&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961298788219420672" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961298788219420672" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 08, 2018  06:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to the Republic of Korea on what will be a MAGNIFICENT Winter Olympics! What the South Korean people have built is truly an inspiration! https://t.co/giN2B1h6Ph&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961362249880252416" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961362249880252416" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 08, 2018  06:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Budget Agreement today is so important for our great Military. It ends the dangerous sequester and gives Secretary Mattis what he needs to keep America Great. Republicans and Democrats must support our troops and support this Bill!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961368036782628864" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961368036782628864" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 08, 2018  19:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Will be heading over shortly to make remarks at The National Prayer Breakfast in Washington. Great religious and political leaders</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961557382387167238" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961557382387167238" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 09, 2018  01:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Our founders invoked our Creator four times in the Declaration of Independence. Our currency declares “IN GOD WE TRUST.” And we place our hands on our hearts as we recite the Pledge of Allegiance and proclaim that we are “One Nation Under God.” #NationalPrayerBreakfast https://t.co/zukP40Ezpo&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961649129834283008" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961649129834283008" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 09, 2018  02:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I will be meeting with Henry Kissinger at 1:45pm. Will be discussing North Korea</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961671974153080834" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961671974153080834" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 09, 2018  04:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;As long as we open our eyes to God’s grace - and open our hearts to God’s love - then America will forever be the land of the free</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961693860916289536" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961693860916289536" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 09, 2018  07:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Time to end the visa lottery. Congress must secure the immigration system and protect Americans. https://t.co/yukxm48x9X&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961743032952459264" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961743032952459264" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 09, 2018  11:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Wow! -Senator Mark Warner got caught having extensive contact with a lobbyist for a Russian oligarch. Warner did not want a “paper trail” on a “private” meeting (in London) he requested with Steele of fraudulent Dossier fame. All tied into Crooked Hillary.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961802557646569475" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961802557646569475" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 09, 2018  21:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just signed Bill. Our Military will now be stronger than ever before. We love and need our Military and gave them everything — and more. First time this has happened in a long time. Also means JOBS</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961957671246159875" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961957671246159875" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 09, 2018  21:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Without more Republicans in Congress</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961959738853548033" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961959738853548033" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 09, 2018  21:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Costs on non-military lines will never come down if we do not elect more Republicans in the 2018 Election</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_961962694650757121" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/961962694650757121" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 10, 2018  22:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Jobless claims have dropped to a 45 year low!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_962326008127946752" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/962326008127946752" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 10, 2018  22:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democrats sent a very political and long response memo which they knew</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_962330457886076928" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/962330457886076928" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 10, 2018  23:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;According to the @nytimes</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_962345433170415616" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/962345433170415616" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 10, 2018  23:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Peoples lives are being shattered and destroyed by a mere allegation. Some are true and some are false. Some are old and some are new. There is no recovery for someone falsely accused - life and career are gone. Is there no such thing any longer as Due Process?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_962348831789797381" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/962348831789797381" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 11, 2018  02:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“My view is that not only has Trump been vindicated in the last several weeks about the mishandling of the Dossier and the lies about the Clinton/DNC Dossier</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_962389786328797184" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/962389786328797184" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 11, 2018  02:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Republicans want to fix DACA far more than the Democrats do. The Dems had all three branches of government back in 2008-2011</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Feb 11, 2018  05:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My thoughts and prayers are with the two police officers</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_962435602296786944" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/962435602296786944" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 11, 2018  07:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My Administration has identified three major priorities for creating a safe</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_962469767109009408" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/962469767109009408" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2018  02:21</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;So many positive things going on for the U.S.A. and the Fake News Media just doesn’t want to go there. Same negative stories over and over again! No wonder the People no longer trust the media</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_962753552824365056" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/962753552824365056" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2018  03:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;4.2 million hard working Americans have already received a large Bonus and/or Pay Increase because of our recently Passed Tax Cut &amp;amp; Jobs Bill....and it will only get better! We are far ahead of schedule.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_962767075457593344" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/962767075457593344" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2018  04:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Rep. Lou Barletta</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_962784821389996033" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/962784821389996033" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2018  04:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just spoke to @JohnKasich to express condolences and prayers to all for the horrible shooting of two great police officers from @WestervillePD. This is a true tragedy!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_962787355932360706" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/962787355932360706" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2018  20:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This will be a big week for Infrastructure. After so stupidly spending $7 trillion in the Middle East</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_963031666150313984" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/963031666150313984" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2018  20:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to Sue Kruczek</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_963033580107653120" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/963033580107653120" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 13, 2018  04:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The journey to #MAGA began @CPAC 2011 and the opportunity to reconnect with friends and supporters is something I look forward to every year. See you at #CPAC2018!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_963152799486828544" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/963152799486828544" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 13, 2018  18:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Our infrastructure plan has been put forward and has received great reviews by everyone except</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_963362959463469058" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/963362959463469058" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 13, 2018  18:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Negotiations on DACA have begun. Republicans want to make a deal and Democrats say they want to make a deal. Wouldn’t it be great if we could finally</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_963365328716812288" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/963365328716812288" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; No child</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_963878055969198080" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/963878055969198080" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 15, 2018  04:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just spoke to Governor Rick Scott. Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964151653669711872" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964151653669711872" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 16, 2018  03:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SpoxDHS: Schumer-Rounds-Collins destroys the ability of @DHSgov to enforce immigration laws</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964218319783055360" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964218319783055360" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 16, 2018  03:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Schumer-Rounds-Collins immigration bill would be a total catastrophe. @DHSgov says it would be “the end of immigration enforcement in America.” It creates a giant amnesty (including for dangerous criminals)</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964219102683377665" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964219102683377665" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 16, 2018  03:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...lottery</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964219299211735040" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964219299211735040" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 16, 2018  04:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Presidential Proclamation Honoring the Victims of the Tragedy in Parkland</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964232645495459840" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964232645495459840" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 16, 2018  22:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I will be leaving for Florida today to meet with some of the bravest people on earth - but people whose lives have been totally shattered. Am also working with Congress on many fronts.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964509154357411840" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964509154357411840" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 16, 2018  22:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Cannot believe how BADLY DACA recipients have been treated by the Democrats...totally abandoned! Republicans are still working hard.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964512164865363968" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964512164865363968" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 17, 2018  04:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Russia started their anti-US campaign in 2014</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964594780088033282" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964594780088033282" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 17, 2018  12:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Our entire Nation</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964724390637244417" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964724390637244417" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 18, 2018  03:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Melania and I met such incredible people last night in Broward County</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964938678362628096" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964938678362628096" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 18, 2018  03:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“Charges Deal Don A Big Win</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964944088696049666" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964944088696049666" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 18, 2018  03:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Deputy A.G. Rod Rosenstein stated at the News Conference: “There is no allegation in the indictment that any American was a knowing participant in this illegal activity. There is no allegation in the indictment that the charged conduct altered the outcome of the 2016 election.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964946611502747649" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964946611502747649" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 18, 2018  03:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Funny how the Fake News Media doesn’t want to say that the Russian group was formed in 2014</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964949269374529538" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964949269374529538" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 18, 2018  04:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Fake News Media never fails. Hard to ignore this fact from the Vice President of Facebook Ads</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964955496137535488" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964955496137535488" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 18, 2018  04:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“I have seen all of the Russian ads and I can say very definitively that swaying the election was *NOT* the main goal.” Rob Goldman Vice President of Facebook Ads https://t.co/A5ft7cGJkE&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_964956781670694912" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/964956781670694912" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 18, 2018  07:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just like they don’t want to solve the DACA problem</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_965009332042596352" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/965009332042596352" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 18, 2018  12:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Very sad that the FBI missed all of the many signals sent out by the Florida school shooter. This is not acceptable. They are spending too much time trying to prove Russian collusion with the Trump campaign - there is no collusion. Get back to the basics and make us all proud!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_965075589274177536" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/965075589274177536" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 18, 2018  12:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;General McMaster forgot to say that the results of the 2016 election were not impacted or changed by the Russians and that the only Collusion was between Russia and Crooked H</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_965079126829871104" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/965079126829871104" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 18, 2018  20:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Never gotten over the fact that Obama was able to send $1.7 Billion Dollars in CASH to Iran and nobody in Congress</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_965194903142719489" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/965194903142719489" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div><script src="../assets/filter.js"></script>
```
